description: Job state-transition event. Append-only TID-keyed. Replaces the RW `advanceJob` UPDATE pattern with an event log; latest state derived by reading all events for a `jobUri`, sorting by `emittedAt`, taking the last. Per ADR-2605231400 + maps MIGRATION-TODO Phase 1 (Tier A).

jobUri.description: AT URI of the com.etzhayyim.maps.collectionJob record this event advances.

state.description: Job state at this point in time. Terminal states: completed / failed / skipped / superseded.

progressPctBps.description: Progress in basis points (10000 = 100%). Integer to avoid float drift.

errorClass.description: Required when state == 'failed'. Stable identifier for the failure category (e.g., 'upstream-timeout', 'parse-error', 'rate-limit').

errorDetail.description: Free-form failure detail. Required when state == 'failed'.

emittedBy.description: Worker / dispatcher DID that emitted the event.
